message:
🧹 Unexport 4 file-private types that have zero external importers (#10222)

Fixes #10219

ShapeType, AccessibleStatusConfig, ClassifiedError, and KubaraChartEntry
are used only within their declaring files. Removing `export` shrinks the
public API surface without affecting any consumer.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

files.patch:
@@ -25,9 +25,9 @@ export type StatusLevel =
   | 'loading'
 
 export type PatternType = 'solid' | 'striped' | 'dotted' | 'dashed' | 'none'
-export type ShapeType = 'circle' | 'triangle' | 'square' | 'diamond' | 'none'
+type ShapeType = 'circle' | 'triangle' | 'square' | 'diamond' | 'none'
 
-export interface AccessibleStatusConfig {
+interface AccessibleStatusConfig {
   icon: LucideIcon
   pattern: PatternType
   shape: ShapeType

@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ import { SECONDS_PER_MINUTE } from './constants/time'
 
 export type ClusterErrorType = 'timeout' | 'auth' | 'network' | 'certificate' | 'unknown'
 
-export interface ClassifiedError {
+interface ClassifiedError {
   type: ClusterErrorType
   message: string
   suggestion: string
